title: ajania fruticulosa var. davidi
intro: Ajania fruticulosa var. davidi, also known as dwarf Ajania or David's Ajania, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of central Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Ajania fruticulosa var. davidi can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
